description: Ground-truth (obligation + matched policies -> GapStatus) for gap analyzer eval.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall put in place a Customer Identification Procedure (CIP) covering name, address, and government-issued ID at account opening.

matched_policies.text: The Bank maintains a Customer Identification Programme (CIP) requiring collection of customer name, address, date of birth, and a government-issued photo ID for all individual accounts prior to account opening.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall identify and verify beneficial owners holding 25% or more of voting rights in non-individual customers.

matched_policies.text: For non-individual customers (companies, trusts, partnerships), the Bank identifies and verifies beneficial owners holding 25% or more of voting rights.

items.obligation_text: Risk categorisation for HIGH-risk customers shall be reviewed at least once every six months.

matched_policies.text: Risk category is reviewed annually for Medium risk and bi-annually for Low risk customers.

items.obligation_text: Enhanced Due Diligence shall be performed for Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs).

matched_policies.text: Customers are categorised as Low, Medium, or High risk at onboarding using a risk scoring model.

items.obligation_text: Suspicious Transaction Reports shall be filed with FIU-IND within 7 days of detection.

matched_policies.text: The Bank files Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs) with FIU-IND within 7 days of detection.

items.obligation_text: All transaction records shall be maintained for 10 years from cessation under PMLA.
Banks shall monitor wire transfers for originator and beneficiary information completeness.

matched_policies.text: The Bank files STRs with FIU-IND within 7 days of detection.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall maintain CRAR of at least 11.5% including capital conservation buffer.

matched_policies.text: The Bank maintains minimum CRAR of 11.5% (including capital conservation buffer) as prescribed by RBI.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall maintain a Leverage Ratio of not less than 4%.

matched_policies.text: The Bank maintains minimum CRAR of 11.5%.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall maintain Net Stable Funding Ratio of at least 100%.

matched_policies.text: The Bank maintains LCR of at least 100% per RBI Master Circular on Basel III.

items.obligation_text: Board Risk Management Committee shall meet at least quarterly.

matched_policies.text: The Board Risk Management Committee (BRMC) meets at least quarterly.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall establish a Whistleblower / Vigil Mechanism for employees to report concerns.
Cyber security incidents shall be reported to RBI within 6 hours of detection.

matched_policies.text: The Bank maintains a Board-approved Information Security Policy aligned with RBI Master Direction on IT Framework.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall resolve grievances within 30 days through a Board-approved mechanism.

matched_policies.text: The Bank has a Board-approved Grievance Redressal Policy. Customer complaints are resolved within 30 days.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall compensate customers for unauthorized electronic transactions within 10 working days.

matched_policies.text: The Bank has a Board-approved Grievance Redressal Policy resolving complaints within 30 days.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall conduct due diligence on third-party IT service providers.

matched_policies.text: The Bank maintains a Board-approved Information Security Policy reviewed annually.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall manage interest rate risk in the banking book through duration and earnings-at-risk metrics.

matched_policies.text: The Bank manages interest rate risk in the banking book through duration limits and earnings-at-risk (EaR) metrics monitored by ALCO monthly.

items.obligation_text: Insurers shall maintain a solvency ratio of at least 150% under IRDAI norms.
Banks shall have a Board-approved Loan Policy defining credit appraisal standards.

matched_policies.text: The Bank's Loan Policy defines credit appraisal standards, concentration limits, and collateral requirements.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall not extend credit to related parties beyond Connected Lending framework limits.

matched_policies.text: The Bank's Loan Policy defines concentration limits (sector, geography, borrower group).
